data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The time to acquire a target is a function of the distance and size of the target.
data.technical_spec: Ensures button size and placement facilitate easy interactions.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Decision-making time increases with the number of choices.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation reduces cognitive load for users.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites, expecting yours to work the same way.
data.technical_spec: Adopts common design patterns for familiarity.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Objects near each other are perceived as related.
data.technical_spec: Groups related elements together visually to signify relationship.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: People judge an experience based on how they felt at its peak and at its end.
data.technical_spec: Focuses on crucial interaction points to enhance user satisfaction.
